cookieConsent.text: We use cookies to run the shop and the sheet editor properly, and to understand site traffic.

hero.title: Turn your memories into a beautiful collectible treasure!
hero.perex: A Creative Sheet featuring renowned artists or landmarks from your travels!
hero.step2Text: Add your own photos - maybe ones you took on your phone today.
hero.step3Text: Add your own personal message to the Creative Sheet.
hero.sliderAlt: Create your own sheet with stamps and photos

review1.text: A beautiful memory of the Czech Republic!
review1.fullText: A beautiful memory of the Czech Republic! After returning from Prague, I had a sheet made from my own travel photos, and combining it with traditionally hand-engraved Czech stamps is absolutely magical. The package arrived carefully wrapped and without a single scratch. I'll treasure this for the rest of my life.

review2.fullText: A unique souvenir, beautifully made. I was looking for a gift that wouldn't just be another fridge magnet from a souvenir shop, and this was exactly it. The print is sharp down to the smallest detail, the paper feels great, and the online editor was easy to use even for me, though I'd never done anything like it before. I'll definitely recommend it to friends.

review3.text: Brought it home as a gift - everyone loved it!
review3.fullText: Brought it home as a gift - everyone loved it! I ordered several right after returning from Prague, one for each family member, each with different photos. I was worried an order from abroad would be complicated, but the whole process went smoothly and quickly. Now everyone at home has a piece of our shared trip.

review4.fullText: Excellent print quality, fast delivery. I ordered all the way to Japan and the package still arrived in perfect condition within a reasonable time. The colors are vivid, the details sharp, and the packaging was sturdy enough that the sheet survived the trip without a single bent corner.

review5.text: Ordered one for the whole family, everyone loved it.
review5.fullText: Ordered one for the whole family, everyone loved it. Before our family gathering I prepared a personal sheet for everyone with photos from our trip to Prague. It was the hit of the evening - everyone got a unique memory and nobody expected it to look so professional.

stampCategories.title: A Creative Sheet with a piece of history
stampCategories.intro: Postage stamps on a sheet are miniature windows into the world of culture, science and art. On a Creative Sheet you'll find works that have survived centuries - and now come to life alongside your own photos.

history.title: Czech and European history
history.text: Rulers, events, milestones that shaped Western civilization.

artists.title: World-renowned artists
artists.text: Alfons Mucha, Kupka, Filla and their works of art.

landmarks.title: Landmarks and architecture
landmarks.text: Prague, Český Krumlov, Telč, Charles Bridge. Icons of Czech architecture.

heritage.title: World cultural heritage
heritage.text: Music, poetry, theatre. The richness that shaped Europe's spirit.

purchaseCategories.title: What can you buy from us?
purchaseCategories.intro: Four product categories for gift lovers and collectors alike. We recommend a sheet with your own photos.
purchaseCategories.exploreLink: → Find out how to create your own Creative Sheet

stamps.title: Postage stamps
stamps.text: Collectible and classic stamps featuring Czech and European history, art or nature.

sheets.title: Creative Sheets
sheets.text: A sheet made of real postage stamps complemented by your own photos and text.

fdc.title: First Day Cover (FDC)
fdc.text: First-day-of-issue envelopes with a stamp and postmark from the day the stamp was first issued.

plaques.title: Gift Plaques
plaques.text: Representative plaques to give as a gift or as an addition to a collector's set.

createArch.introText: Create a beautiful keepsake or a unique gift in just a few moments, bearing your own signature and forever capturing the magic of your journey. Create a work of art starring you.
createArch.successTitle: Your sheet has been added to the cart!
createArch.successText: Great work. Your design is ready for print and safely saved in your cart. You can adjust the quantity before checkout.

thankYou.title: Your order has been placed!
thankYou.thanksText: Thank you for your purchase at My Creative Stamp. We've just sent the order details with an item overview to your email.
thankYou.spamNotice: Don't forget to check your spam or junk folder.
thankYou.footer: © {year} My Creative Stamp – collectible stamps with a story.

paymentFailed.title: We couldn't complete your payment
paymentFailed.text: Your order #{orderId} was saved, but the card payment didn't go through (e.g. declined by your bank or the verification was interrupted). We've kept your cart – go back and try the payment again, or choose bank transfer instead.

createArch.title: Create a Creative Sheet
createArch.description: Choose a template, upload your own photos and text, and create a unique Creative Sheet with real postage stamps.
